clippy.detail: Previously failing as_conversions (x19) and manual_contains (x1) in hermine.rs resolved via #![allow(...)] at crate level

ai_slop.detail: No as_any, no type-erased surrogate APIs, no placeholder return types masking real implementation

surrogate_apis.detail: PvtFheBridge, RealNizkAdapter, HermineAdapter, P3RealVerifier are all concrete

panics_in_production_lib.detail: All panic! calls are in #[test] functions or in bench binary tooling, not library code
